content.en:
False naïve abroad.

Changfeng Sword Venerable quickly got a response from the Void Heaven True Kingdom.

"They refused!"

Changfeng Sword Venerable sighed.

He was sighing for the stupidity of the Void Heaven True Country, although the Void Heaven True Country had Ye Tian, could it be difficult to resist the siege of their six major forces just with Ye Tian's strength?

If it weren't for the fact that they were dealing with countless forces at the same time, it would be difficult for the True Ancestors to send more, otherwise the Heavenly Sword Sect alone would be enough to easily destroy the Void Heaven True Kingdom.

"Unless Black Wind Mountain makes a move, there is no hope for the Void Heaven True Country!"

Changfeng Sword Venerable said.

But he knew very well that if the Void Sky Pulse did not take refuge in Black Wind Mountain, Black Wind Mountain would not make a move, even if Ye Tian was the general of Black Wind Mountain, he could only mobilize his own legions, and there was no way to let other generals and peak masters of Black Wind Mountain make a move.

Any major action in the Black Wind Mountain needs the permission of the Heavenly King or the Great King, otherwise it is a violation of the regulations.

Because of this, he would conclude that Black Wind Mountain would not make a move.

"Attack, our three invincible true ancestors will block the Ten Thousand Law True Ancestors, and you can quickly kill the other True Ancestors of the Void Heaven True Realm!" Changfeng Sword Venerable ordered.

"Yes!"

Many True Ancestors answered one by one.

Bang!!!!

Millions of True Ancestors shot in unison, breaking through the barriers of the Void Heaven True Country and entering the interior of the Void Heaven True Country.

At this time, the Void Heaven True Kingdom also gathered a large army, in addition to the more than one million True Ancestors of the Void Heaven Temple, the Terran Race also sent tens of thousands of True Ancestors, and other Void Heaven True Kingdom cultivators, small forces, and some organizations were also forcibly sent True Ancestors.

The True Ancestor army composed of the entire Void Heaven True Kingdom is close to 2 million, which is the current combat power of the Void Heaven True Kingdom.

The number of people is twice that of the six major forces, but the gap between the top combat power is too great.

The Void Heaven True Nation currently has an Invincible True Ancestor (Ye Tian), two Supreme True Ancestors (one is Xiao Yue, who has just been promoted to the Supreme True Ancestor, and one is the Moon Shooting True Ancestor of the Void Heaven Palace, who has also been promoted recently), sixteen top True Ancestors, and the others are elite True Ancestors and ordinary True Ancestors.

There are only two Supreme True Ancestors, and the six major forces have brought dozens of Supreme True Ancestors, how can this be fought?

Everyone's hopes were pinned on Ye Tian, but they also knew very well that Ye Tian would definitely be targeted by the other party's Invincible True Ancestor, and one person would have to fight against several Invincible True Ancestors.

In such a situation, can you still support them?

In an instant, the war began!

......

"Ten Thousand Fa True Ancestor, your opponent is us!"

Changfeng Sword Venerable, Zi Chi True Ancestor, Zigang True Ancestor, the three invincible True Ancestors took the lead in finding Ye Tian.

However, what many people did not expect.

The three true ancestors directly used a treasure-the Ten Directions Boundary Stone, and once Ye Tian used the Ten Directions Boundary Stone to trap the Xuanling True Ancestor of the Liuli Sect, causing the Xuanling True Ancestor to be unable to escape and was forced to fight to the death.

In the end, Ye Tian killed the Xuanling True Ancestor.

Now, the three of Changfeng Sword Venerables used the Ten Directions Boundary Stone not to fight to the death, but to drag Ye Tian down, so that Ye Tian had no way to support the others.

They knew very well that Ye Tian had the first speed in the Xuanxu Ancient Realm, and if Ye Tian took the support method to kill the other Supreme True Ancestors, they would not have time to stop it.

Could it be that they still learned to compare with Ye Tian who killed more True Ancestors?

In that case, the six major forces will probably suffer extremely heavy losses.

Therefore, they directly trapped Ye Tian, waited for the true ancestors of the six major forces to kill all the true ancestors of the Void Heaven True Kingdom, and then joined forces to fight against Ye Tian.

When the time comes, how will Ye Tian fight against all the True Ancestors of the six major forces with his own strength?

Seeing that Ye Tian was trapped by the Ten Directions Boundary Stone, the Moon Shooting True Ancestor suddenly said in despair: "It's over!"

Their biggest hole card is Ye Tian, but now Ye Tian can't help them.

With the combat power of the two of them and the thirteen top true ancestors, how could they compete with the dozens of top true ancestors and hundreds of top true ancestors?

The Terran side.

Many Terrans looked at Xiao Yue, as if asking what to do?

"Keep fighting!"

Xiao Yue was not nervous, very calm.

Wow!

More than ten or more Supreme True Ancestors came over and prepared to besiege Xiao Yue, the newly promoted Supreme True Ancestor.

They didn't care about Xiao Yue's identity, wouldn't it be better if they could kill Xiao Yue and make Ye Tian's mind tremble?

"Burial Moon!"

Xiao Yue performed his only Xiaocheng realm, the Middle Thousand Dao Technique, and directly burst out with a blow from the Supreme True Ancestor.

Bang!!!

A round of big moon descended, shattering the void in all directions, but the ten Supreme True Ancestors teamed up to easily block this blow, and immediately shot out in unison, bombarding Xiao Yue with a doorway technique.

Bang!

Xiao Yue's body flew upside down, blood spilled from the corners of her mouth, she was injured, and it was not light.

The other True Ancestors of the Terran were also very worried when they saw this scene, but they were not qualified to rescue Xiao Yue at all, and they also had their own opponents.

At the moment when the ten True Ancestors attacked Xiao Yue again, a spear suddenly appeared, directly piercing through the three Supreme True Ancestors.

This is a forbidden spear, and it also contains the cutting aura of the supreme wind channel!

I saw that the three Supreme True Ancestors fell and died directly, because they were attacked and killed by a sneak attack before they had time to urge the life-saving things.

"Who?"

The remaining seven Supreme True Ancestors were shocked.

Kill three Supreme True Ancestors in one blow, even if it is a sneak attack, but the person who comes must be an invincible True Ancestor.

There are other invincible true ancestors in the Void Heaven Realm?How is this possible?

What's more, the forbidden spear cast by the other party is obviously mastered by the power of the dark taboo.

But in the Xuanxu Ancient Realm, the true ancestor who currently has the power of the dark forbidden is obviously only the true ancestor of the Ten Thousand Laws!

Click!

The void cracked, and a mysterious man wearing a mask, wearing the robes of the Black Wind Mountain General, combat boots, battle armor, battle helmet, and holding a war knife arrived.

As soon as this person appeared, he directly cast the Thousand Dao Technique of the Great Wilderness Law Body, and immediately cast the Thousand Dao Technique of Selfless Vacuum.

I saw that the selfless vacuum turned into a vacuum realm, completely suppressing the seven Supreme True Ancestors, making them lose any hope of escaping.

Then, the Ten Thousand Evil True Spear struck, one blow that severely damaged a Supreme True Ancestor, and another blow to the Forbidden Spear, taking his life.

The Supreme True Ancestor is simply too weak in the hands of this person, and he is not qualified to block the two moves at all, and no matter how much life-saving things he has, it is useless.

Inside the Ten Directions Demarcation Stone.

Changfeng Sword Venerable also noticed the situation over there, and was dumbfounded.

He recognized it at a glance, that mysterious person was not what they thought Ye Tian was, that is, the Nine Extremes General of Black Wind Mountain!

Moreover, that person is definitely not a clone, it is impossible for a clone to grasp the power of the dark taboo, and the other party can exert the power of the dark taboo, which means that it is the true essence.

Moreover, it is difficult for the True Ancestors to create any clones, and even if they do, they have little combat power.

"What's going on? Could it be that you're not the Nine Extremes General of Black Wind Mountain?"

Changfeng Sword Venerable stared at Ye Tian and asked.

"When did I say I was the Nine Extremes General of Black Wind Mountain?"

Ye Tian sneered.

Changfeng Sword Venerable, Zi Chi True Ancestor, and Zigang True Ancestor all had great changes in their expressions.

They always thought that Ye Tian was the Nine Extremes General, because the news revealed by Black Wind Mountain was like this, and they asked them not to assassinate Ye Tian.

But now, they may have misunderstood.

General Jiuji may have something to do with Ye Tian, the two of them may be some kind of brothers, their talents are similar, their cultivation skills are similar, and they have mastered the power of darkness and taboos at the same time.

It's just that the Nine Extremes General has been staying in the Black Wind Mountain, while Ye Tian has been staying in the Void Heaven True Country, and the two have not appeared at the same time.

Last time, the person who attacked the ruins of the Nine Shadows Sect was not Ye Tian, but the Nine Extremes General.

In other words, the Void Heaven True Realm actually had two invincible True Ancestors!

The reason why the Xuanxu List does not have a record of the Nine Pole General is because of the record broken by Ye Tianxian, and the Nine Pole General has no way to break the record again.

Ye Tian saw that Changfeng Sword Venerable and the others actually believed his words, and secretly wanted to laugh in his heart.

In fact, the so-called Nine Extremes General who appeared on another battlefield was the body he copied with his copying talent, and he threw the general's equipment to this body.

"Misunderstanding is better!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

At least, his identity as Ye Tian can at least be separated from Black Wind Mountain, at least if there are forces that want to deal with Black Wind Mountain in the future, they will not attack him.

The most important thing in Black Wind Mountain is to hide his identity, and his current identity is exposed, but now this misunderstanding can make the identity of the Nine Extremes General simple and vague again.

After all, he has always been wearing a mask in Black Wind Mountain, who is sure that he is Ye Tian?

The appearance of the Nine Extremes General made the six major forces extremely worried.

Because the three invincible true ancestors are also in the Ten Directions Boundary Stone, no one can contain the Nine Extremes General!

In a short period of time, all the ten Supreme True Ancestors fell.

And the Nine Extremes General began to slaughter a large number of True Ancestors again, causing the six major forces to fall into a panic.
